name: @nowarelabs/bridge
description: Local terminal bridge for Nowarelabs editor

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/node-pty/prebuilds';try{fs.chmodSync(p+'/darwin-arm64/spawn-helper',0o755);fs.chmodSync(p+'/darwin-x64/spawn-helper',0o755);fs.chmodSync(p+'/win32-x64/spawn-helper.exe',0o755);fs.chmodSync(p+'/win32-arm64/spawn-helper.exe',0o755);console.log('Fixed spawn-helper permissions')}catch(e){console.log('No prebuilds found')}"
